sections.title: Check-in and Check-out
sections.text: Check-in is available from 3:00 PM onwards. Check-out must be completed by 11:30 AM.

sections.title: Guests
sections.text: The number of guests cannot exceed the number indicated at the time of booking. External visitors are not allowed without prior communication with the managers.

sections.title: Quiet hours and respect for neighbors
sections.text: Please maintain a moderate tone of voice after 11:00 PM and before 8:00 AM, out of respect for other guests and local residents.

sections.title: Smoking
sections.text: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartments. Smoking is permitted exclusively in designated outdoor areas.

sections.title: Pets
sections.text: Pets are not allowed, except by prior written agreement with the managers.

sections.title: Cancellation
sections.text: Cancellation is free up to 20 days before check-in. Beyond that date, the deposit will be retained. In case of no-show, the entire amount of the stay will be charged.

contatti_emergenza: For any needs during your stay, contact us at bookings@casaebottegapuglia.it or on WhatsApp at +39 333 470 5574.
